summary: F6A (Bullpen-Aware Under Selector) + F6B (Script Breaks Storage) — Backend testing completed. All F6A pure function tests passed. All F6B storage/retrieval endpoints working correctly. MLB pipeline regression test passed.

flaky_endpoints.issue: 502 Bad Gateway - preview environment not responding
flaky_endpoints.impact: Transient infrastructure issue, not related to F6A/F6B changes
flaky_endpoints.note: This is an infrastructure/deployment issue, not a code regression

passed_tests: F6A TEST A: High bullpen (HIGH) + strong starters (72) + pitcher-friendly park → F5 Under selected, confidence_adjustment=-12, reason_codes=['BULLPEN_RISK_DOWNGRADES_FULL_GAME_UNDER', 'STARTER_PARK_SUPPORTS_F5_UNDER']
F6A TEST B: Low bullpen (LOW) + strong starters → Full Game Under 9.5 retained, rule_triggered=False
F6A TEST C: Weak starters (45) + high bullpen → rule_triggered=False (precondition starter_strong fails)
F6A TEST D: Low edge (0.7 < 2.0) + high bullpen → rule_triggered=False (precondition edge_supports_under fails)
F6A BONUS: High bullpen + no F5 line + protected alt 11.5 available → PROTECTED_FULL_GAME_UNDER selected
F6A BONUS 2: High bullpen + no alts + low final confidence → NO_BET (selected_market score < 65)
F6A: Non-Under market (Run Line +1.5) → rule_triggered=False, no bullpen_swap_meta
F6A Endpoint: POST /api/analysis/run sport=baseball returns picks without error (8 picks returned, all Run Line +1.5)

F6B Settle Hook: POST /api/mlb/picks/{pick_id}/settle persists script break event with script_broken=True, severity=STRONG, learning_event_codes=['UNDER_BUSTED_BY_STARTER_BLOWUP', 'UNDER_BUSTED_BY_OFFENSIVE_BREAKOUT']
F6B GET: GET /api/mlb/script_breaks?days=30&limit=20 returns {ok:true, count:2, items:[...]} with required fields [pick_id, pregame_script, script_broken, severity, outcome, learning_event_codes]
F6B GET: GET /api/mlb/script_breaks/stats?days=60 returns {ok:true, window_days:60, total:2, broken:2, broken_rate:1.0, by_script:{...}, top_learning_codes:[...]}
F6B Auth: GET /api/mlb/script_breaks without Authorization returns 401
F6B Idempotency: Settling same pick_id twice with different outcomes keeps only LAST document (outcome=lost)
Regression: MLB pipeline still produces picks/rescued/structural_lean/watchlist buckets (no regression on _mlb_script_v3, _mlb_script_v2)

baseball_analysis.note: All picks were Run Line +1.5 (underdog), no Under picks in current data to trigger bullpen_swap_meta, but endpoint did not break

idempotency.note: Settling same pick_id twice keeps only last document (upsert by pick_id)

football_pipeline.error: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
football_pipeline.note: Transient infrastructure issue, not related to F6A/F6B code changes
